2026-04-27T08:30:02.6591363Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-27T08:30:02.6592255Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-27T08:30:02.6592694Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-27T08:30:02.6593070Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-27T08:30:02.6593381Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-27T08:30:02.6593619Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-27T08:30:02.6595104Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

If provided, the 'direction' also needs to be provided.","enum":["CREATED_AT","UPDATED_AT","COMMENTS"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Repository owner","type":"string"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"repo":{"description":"Repository name","type":"string"},"since":{"description":"Filter by date (ISO 8601 timestamp)","type":"string"},"state":{"description":"Filter by state, by default both open and closed issues are returned when not provided","enum":["OPEN","CLOSED"],"type":"string"}},"required":["owner","repo"],"type":"object"},"name":"list_issues"},{"annotations":{"readOnlyHint":true,"title":"Search issues"},"description":"Search for issues in GitHub repositories using issues search syntax already scoped to is:issue","icons":[{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"light"},{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"dark"}],"inputSchema":{"properties":{"order":{"description":"Sort order","enum":["asc","desc"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Optional repository owner. If provided with repo, only issues for this repository are listed.","type":"string"},"page":{"description":"Page number for pagination (min 1)","minimum":1,"type":"number"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"query":{"description":"Search query using GitHub issues search syntax","type":"string"},"repo":{"description":"Optional repository name. If provided with owner, only issues for this repository are listed.","type":"string"},"sort":{"description":"Sort field by number of matches of categories, defaults to best match","enum":["comments","reactions","reactions-+1","reactions--1","reactions-smile","reactions-thinking_face","reactions-heart","reactions-tada","interactions","created","updated"],"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_issues"}]}}}

2026-04-27T08:31:25.1701575Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T08:31:00.068355029Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58691,\"title\":\"MPG emitter: [CodeGenMember] on additional-properties bag mis-emits identifier in Deserialize\",\"body\":\"## Summary\\n\\nApplying `[CodeGenMember(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;AdditionalProperties\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;)]` (e.g., to re-attach a `[WirePath]` attribute) to the synthesized property bag of a model that uses `...Record;` (additional-properties spread) causes the generated `Deserialize` method to use a wrong local-variable identifier.\\n\\n## Repro\\n\\nApply this customization to `Azure.ResourceManager.Redis.Models.RedisCommonConfiguration` (which has `...Record;` spread):\\n\\n```csharp\\npublic partial class RedisCommonConfiguration\\n{\\n    [CodeGenMember(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;AdditionalProperties\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;)]\\n    [WirePath(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;AdditionalProperties\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;)]\\n    public IDictionary AdditionalProperties =\\u0026gt; _additionalBinaryDataProperties;\\n}\\n```\\n\\nRegenerate. The generated `DeserializeRedisCommonConfiguration` ends up with:\\n\\n```csharp\\nIDictionary additionalProperties = new ChangeTrackingDictionary();\\nforeach (var prop in element.EnumerateObject())\\n{\\n    // ... known props ...\\n    if (options.Format != \\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;W\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;)\\n    {\\n        additionalBinaryDataProperties.Add(prop.Name, BinaryData.FromString(prop.Value.GetRawText())); // CS0103: undefined\\n    }\\n}\\nreturn new RedisCommonConfiguration(/* ... */, additionalProperties);\\n```\\n\\nThe local is declared `additionalProperties` but the catch-all line uses `additionalBinaryDataProperties`. Compile fails with CS0103.\\n\\nThe serializer (`JsonModelWriteCore`) is fine - it consistently uses `_additionalBinaryDataProperties`.\\n\\n## Workaround\\n\\n`[CodeGenSuppress(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;DeserializeRedisCommonConfiguration\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;, typeof(JsonElement), typeof(ModelReaderWriterOptions))]` and re-implement the method in custom code with the local name fixed.\\n\\n## Context\\n\\nEncountered while migrating `Azure.ResourceManager.Redis` (PR #56877). Emitter version: `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt@1.0.0-alpha.20260423.3`.\\n\\n(Originally filed as Azure/typespec-azure#4331 - wrong repo, closed.)\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58691\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-27T08:28:32Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-27T08:28:32Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-04-27T08:31:25.1722609Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-27T08:31:00.33507888Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58691,\"title\":\"MPG emitter: [CodeGenMember] on additional-properties bag mis-emits identifier in Deserialize\",\"body\":\"## Summary\\n\\nApplying `[CodeGenMember(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;AdditionalProperties\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;)]` (e.g., to re-attach a `[WirePath]` attribute) to the synthesized property bag of a model that uses `...Record;` (additional-properties spread) causes the generated `Deserialize` method to use a wrong local-variable identifier.\\n\\n## Repro\\n\\nApply this customization to `Azure.ResourceManager.Redis.Models.RedisCommonConfiguration` (which has `...Record;` spread):\\n\\n```csharp\\npublic partial class RedisCommonConfiguration\\n{\\n    [CodeGenMember(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;AdditionalProperties\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;)]\\n    [WirePath(\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;AdditionalProperties\\u0026#34;\\u0026#34;)]\\n    public IDictionary AdditionalProperties =\\u0026gt; _additionalBinaryDataProperties;\\n}\\n```\\n\\nRegenerate.
